tasks.title: Scale PostgreSQL and Configure Backups
subtasks: Scale CloudNative-PG 'sigma1-postgres' cluster from 1 to 3 replicas.
Configure automated daily backups and WAL archiving to S3 for 'sigma1-postgres'.

tasks.title: Scale Redis/Valkey with Sentinel and Maxmemory
subtasks: Enable Redis Sentinel with 3 replicas for 'sigma1-valkey' cluster.
Configure appropriate maxmemory policy for 'sigma1-valkey' instances.

tasks.title: Scale NATS Cluster and Configure JetStream
Implement TLS Certificates via cert-manager
subtasks: Configure cert-manager to provision and manage TLS certificates (e.g., Let's Encrypt) for all external-facing services.

tasks.title: Configure Ingress Controller (NGINX)
subtasks: Deploy and configure an NGINX Ingress controller to manage external access to services, integrating with cert-manager for TLS.

tasks.title: Configure Cloudflare CDN for Static Assets
subtasks: Configure Cloudflare CDN for caching and serving static assets from S3/R2 buckets.

tasks.title: Implement Kubernetes Network Policies
subtasks: Define and apply Kubernetes Network Policies to restrict pod-to-pod and namespace-to-namespace traffic based on least privilege.

tasks.title: Deploy OpenTelemetry Collector
subtasks: Deploy OpenTelemetry collector with appropriate sampling rates for traces and metrics.

tasks.title: Deploy Jaeger for Distributed Tracing
subtasks: Deploy Jaeger with persistent storage configured for long-term trace retention.

tasks.title: Configure Alerting for SLO Violations
subtasks: Define and configure alert rules for key Service Level Objective (SLO) violations across all services.
